evals.prompt: I need domain variants for authorized test domain example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the domain-variants skill for this domain variant generator request and produce the documented result for authorized test domain example.com.
expectations: Selects domain-variants for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_generate_domain_variants.

Keeps the response focused on generating certificate test cases for domain variants such as homoglyphs, subdomains, TLD changes, hyphenation, or inserted characters for authorized phishing detection research.

evals.prompt: Generate authorized lookalike domain variants for example.com for a phishing detection test.
evals.expected_output: Use the domain-variants skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects domain-variants instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
